summary: Control Room UI specs and roadmap implementation slices
knowledge_changes: Added product Control Room UI spec for a standalone local-first browser command center with retro terminal style.
Added system Control Room UI component for local hosting, API contract, System view, Graph view, and multi-computer model.
Updated status panel spec to be compact launcher/fallback rather than primary rich UI.
Updated graph navigation, board, product overview, API, adapters, extension, graph, file-structure, architecture map, system overview, and lexicon to align with the Control Room direction.
roadmap_changes: Created TASK-058 for local Control Room shell and launch path.
Created TASK-059 for System architecture diagram and component inspector.
Created TASK-060 for visual generated graph map.
